ValidationRule.description: To make the field Complaint Jusified mandatory for B2STD countries when the type of the case is complaint
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), NOT( CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName) ), OR( RecordType.Name = "Case External India", RecordType.Name = "Case External Turkey", RecordType.Name = "Case External Latvia", RecordType.Name = "Case External Lithuania", RecordType.Name = "Case External Estonia", RecordType.Name = "Case External Brazil", RecordType.Name = "Case External Algeria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Bulgaria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Norway", RecordType.Name = "Case External Morocco", RecordType.Name = "Case External Greece", RecordType.Name = "Case External Romania", RecordType.Name = "Case External Russia" ), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))) ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Complaint"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,"Complaint") ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_justified__c)) )
